field.label: Enable Encryption
field.help: Enable HTTPS, DNS-over-HTTPS, DNS-over-TLS, and DNS-over-QUIC.

field.label: Server Name
field.help: The hostname used for TLS certificate validation (SNI). Must match the certificate's Common Name or SAN.

field.label: Force HTTPS
field.help: Redirect the AdGuard Home web interface from HTTP to HTTPS automatically.

field.label: HTTPS Port
field.help: Port for the HTTPS web interface and DNS-over-HTTPS.

field.label: Certificate Path
field.help: Full path to the TLS certificate file (PEM format).

field.label: Private Key Path
field.help: Full path to the TLS private key file (PEM format).

field.label: Allow Unencrypted DoH
field.help: Allow DNS-over-HTTPS requests via unencrypted HTTP. Useful when TLS is terminated by a reverse proxy.

field.label: Strict SNI Check
field.help: Reject connections if the SNI does not match the server name.
